description: Design system exceptions and approved deviations

raw_buttons.reason: Legacy demo voting UI - scheduled for Phase 5 migration

raw_colors.reason: Intentional celebratory design for voter UX - preserves emotional feedback
Public marketing page - intentional blue branding for consistency with voter-facing materials
Intentional decorative gradient for results CTA - visual hierarchy

Unified brand gold color for premium/ceremonial design across headers and results pages. Creates prestige and authority feel distinct from functional warning colors. Not a functional semantic color, pure branding/ceremonial design. Standardized via Tailwind config.
raw_colors.notes: Defined in tailwind.config.js as 'brand-gold' color scale. Replaces previous inconsistent gold values (#b5862b in header, #d4af37 in results).

component_deviations.reason: Sub-component with internal color logic - managed separately from Pages layer
component_deviations.notes: Will be refactored as part of layout consolidation
